behaviorsAudited: Completion pipeline start events from scripts/goal/prep.mjs are persisted to .tmp/agenc-tui-completion-pipeline/events.jsonl and TUI renders the first gate as active while preserving transcript context.

edgeCasesAudited: Missing persisted pipeline file renders nothing.
Malformed persisted event is ignored without crashing.
A prep started event produces an active first gate line.
